name: anhurdb-memory-hermes
description: The Hermes memory identity: a persistent, sovereign long-term memory backed by AnhurDB, isolated from the default Claude memory (its own tenant + container 'hermes-ltm' + state dir ~/.anhur-hermes-memory). Same engine as anhurdb-memory: auto-recall at session start, incremental auto-persist every turn and at session end, no-silent-loss disk queue + retry. Also bundles the AnhurDB MCP tools for explicit recall/store during a session.
